Story Title: Production AUS API returning 500 on co-applicant lookup
Description: Investigate and fix 504s seen on /aus/decision after the 4/22 release — affecting ~3% of conforming SF submissions.
Add automated check confirming DR snapshots completed and are restorable. Page on failure.

Story Title: Quarterly security patch rollout — Q2 batch
Description: Apply CVE-flagged patches to the loan-workbench app servers per the standing security calendar.
Bring-your-own-tooling cleanup — decommission orphaned dev environments and consolidate dev-tool licenses.
Decommission deprecated GitHub repos no longer referenced by any active service. Archive history then delete.
Dependency hygiene — bring analytics jobs onto supported pandas with no behavior change.
Adjust existing fee rules to reflect updated standard processing costs. No new fee types — pure parameter tune.
Update existing DQ rule set on the loan-officer dashboard to flag stale records by new threshold.
Run the standing FDIC stress-test workflow for Q2 and submit results per the existing process.
Continue running the existing OFAC screening pipeline against new applications and report exceptions.

Story Title: CFPB Reg X servicing rule update — 2026 amendments
Description: Implement the CFPB Reg X 2026 amendments by effective date 2026-10-01. New disclosure timing and content.

Story Title: Same-Day Lender Commitments for Conforming SF Loans
Description: Outcome: 90% of conforming SF loans receive a commit same-day (baseline 35%) by Q4. Sponsor: SVP SF Acquisitions.
Multi-year migration of legacy EDW workloads to Snowflake. Sponsored by CTO. Funded enterprise-wide.
Single-LoB SVP-sponsored redesign of the underwriter workbench — funded from SF Originations.
Automate ingestion of servicer NOI / occupancy data to drive same-day watchlist decisions. MF SVP sponsored.
Add p95/p99 latency views to the CapMkts pricing-API team dashboard. Block-funded quarterly enhancement.
Block-scoped UX experiment behind a feature flag. Targeted to two pilot regions.
